---
title: Energy-Efficient Video Processing for Virtual Reality
author:
- Yue Leng
- Chi-Chun Chen
- Qiuyue Sun
- Jian Huang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3307650.3322264
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca19-evr-talk.pdf
journ: ISCA
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GL1HWkTdAPY
award: IEEE Micro Top Picks from Computer Architecture Conferences in 2019
pub_number: 30
---
